review_title: A Honest review of Sumologic as Software Engineer
description: Over experience is good when compate to other SEM tolls like Data dog and splk. The most liked is their UI and way of setting environment and saving query and developing the dashboard.
author: Pradeep K.
pros: The way of filtering the Logs and UI is the most attractive part. As I as a software engineer the site most and got more new features like copilot which is an good feature.
cons: The variable complicates the complexity of aggregation queries and is not fine for large queries. As software engineer we do have more than one condition to add that makes it worse.

review_title: Sumo Logic easy to search logs and find issues
description: I really like how Sumo logic works it's fast and intuitive
author: Guillermo B.
pros: It's a easy product to store logs Is I really love the speed and really functional and handy
cons: Is difficult to control the size of the stored logs and the bill will be skyrocket

review_title: Not intuitive for data retrieval
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: There are user guides at-hand for doing data searches, following best practices. You can quickly access these guides and find what you're looking for in gathering specific information for the data fed to the system. There are also many awesome options for taking data found in your log dive and putting it together to become more useful information (such as seeing how many times a specific event occurred in a specific time frame, etc).
cons: The way data is stored and retrieved is not intuitive: key words for items allow for a faster search than specifically picking out the exact value of a parameter you're looking for. For example, you know for the purposes of your search that abc="123"; however, searching for that exact thing will take longer to search for then simply searching for "123" ... which will also find values of "123" for parameters, def, ghi, and jkl if they exist. I only want to find values of "123" for parameter abc. ... yet for some reason, there's no good way to retrieve that information, even though we've fed the data to the system, and it exists. This is more of a problem if you actually need to search your data for specifics on a regular basis; if you're just managing the data and only searching for real time data, it may not be quite as important.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Expensive but the best
description: It worked great and did just about anything I wanted it to do.
author: Brian B.
pros: The ability to custom parse fields on demand using regex is extremely powerful when troubleshooting and doing forensic analysis.
cons: The cost, one of not the most expensive but might be the best out there.

review_title: Excellent log analysis tool if you are affordable in pricing.
description: Application logs pushing to a centralized location & analyzing the logs , troubleshoot using dashboards which solves our application related troubleshooting in a easier way.
author: infant R.
pros: FER Creation , dashboards are most impactful for us. Product is not very much esy to use (need some skills). Integration with our business process are not easy , it takes some time..but once we understands about sumologic features it gave us a major relief in application log analysis. One word excellent tool but if we know how to use it.
cons: It's not user firendly, need some study before working.Especially the costing of frequent/infrequent/contimuous tier. Integration is bit difficult , but our folks worked together to integrate sumologic for pur business needs. The major drawback is it's support , currently there is no support number we need to send mail only & the support team works in pacific timezone which is not suitable for indian time like us. For a support case it takes around 2 weeks to close.

review_title: Sumologic is a leader in threat detection
description: Overall Sumo Logic helped us get the certification our company required and the support was great compared to competitors. It seems to be lagging in features of comparable tools but can compete on price.
author: Matt H.
pros: Like how easy the software was to integrate into our current logging stack (GCP, GitHub, auth0). If you do a multi-year deal the price is competitive.
cons: The query syntax is difficult to work with at times and clunky. The interface and responsiveness could also use some work.

review_title: Centralized logs management and Enhanced Cloud Infra monitoring with Sumo Logic
description: We have been suing SumoLogic since we moved our infra to cloud platforms to manage all logs in one place and monitor our web services. It definitely helps us to diagnose / debug any issues in real time and also we can customize our own dashboard based on our needs.
author: Jitae K.
pros: Its almost real-time now, It used to take little bit of delays but now its almost real time. And it has good integration with other cloud platforms like AWS which makes us easier to monitor and manage our infrastructure and securities.
cons: could be bit pricey but there might be a way to save some like sorting/data filtering based on index or something like that and there is a little bit of learning curve to learn how to query in Sumo

review_title: It is good if you don't have another option
description: It is pricey and it is good, but they can do better with their tool and improve the education process
author: Tamer B.
pros: I like it, it used to be very helpful during my time at my previous employer, and it is good for getting logs
cons: They can do better in queries; it was kind of complicated to use in the beginning

review_title: Hassle free integeration with AWS
description: I have generated multiple Dashboards for real time analytics of cloud watch logs. We were able to carve out business trends and it led us into process improvement.
author: Prasoon K.
pros: Sumo logic is very flexible and easy to integrate with different cloud providers. But it's specifically easy to work with AWS. I had to create an IAM user and provide the credentials to sumo logic collectors which started pulling in data from S3 buckets immediately. Option to generate variety of Dashboards from real-time streaming data.
cons: I didn't like the tabular interface. you have to scroll all the way to the right to find your tabs. It could be have been made more user friendly.

review_title: Heavyweight in monitoring
author: Abner J.
pros: I like the fact that it looks like a mobile app, it is very simple to use, setting up your dashboard is very simple, real-time monitoring is reliable and being able to add a different filter to every running job, gives makes monitoring very simple
cons: the "live mode" button sometimes you open up the app and you forget to switch it on, it would be better if the app is always on live mode

review_title: Il SIEM basato sul Cloud Efficiente
description: È un SIEM abbastanza efficiente nel rilevamento delle minacce e supporta integrazioni con altre applicazioni.
author: Giovanni S.
pros: L'interfaccia utente è abbastanza semplice da utilizzare.
cons: Il prodotto fa il suo dovere ma ha comunque un costo annuo notevole.

review_title: Soluzione SIEM efficiente
description: Sumo Logic si è rivelato un valido strumento per la gestione dei log e il monitoraggio della sicurezza. La facilità di utilizzo e la possibilità di personalizzare dashboard e alert sono punti di forza molto importanti.
author: Raffaele L.
pros: Offre un'interfaccia user-friendly e offre la possibilità di creare dashboard personalizzate. La Scalabilità è elevata e la gestione centralizzata è molto semplice.
cons: Query di ricerca non sempre intuitive, con una curva di apprendimento iniziale.

review_title: The Sumo Logic Way
description: I love that Sumo Logic keeps up with the times and is well-suited for modern, cloud-based environments. While its pricing can be high, it provides ease for ingesting data from logs, metrics, and traces.
author: Brandon R.
pros: That it has a simple and intuitive UI, flexible querying, and the ability to handle various types of data.
cons: That there is a challenging learning curve, a complex initial setup, and slower data processing speeds compared to some competitors.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: This sumo helped us fight our way to visibility
author: Charbel B.
pros: Ease of use. I can easily ingest data with alot of SaaS applications supporting sumo out of the box
cons: It is on the more expensive side. You get good features and great service but it isnt cheap.

review_title: Flexible and detailed log analysis software for System Administrators
description: I use Sumo Logic to ingest logs across a fleet of about 125 servers, including Windows and Linux servers. Setup was pretty straightforward. Documentation is detailed and complete. Customer support and tech support are mostly competent and cooperative. I'd definitely recommend this product, especially to smaller startups or businesses that can't or don't want to implement their own logging server infrastructure.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Extremely flexible search and reporting Log ingestion from essentially any source Good support for major operating systems Decent technical support Good communication with customers Continuously improving the software in all areas PCI/DSS qualified
cons: Some very poor UI design decisions Poor account management Performance can be very bad for searches over large data sets or long timeframes Expensive

review_title: Quick search your logs
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The search time is pretty good, where it searches in huge dumps of data and return a good result set
cons: Copy JSON feature is a big problem, where you cannot copy a part of result JSON

review_title: A Powerful Tool
description: Overall this tool fantastic. It's powerful and is approachable by both the experienced and inexperienced. Once you get into the deeper functionality, you can do pretty much whatever needs to be done with this tool. Just make sure you set it up correctly and what the potential billing pitfalls and your business will be better for having this tool.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: You can search in complex or basic queries so it is good for both new and experienced users. Searching is powerful and fast and user data can be shared with the organization. We have developers create complex searches and share them with support teams and users that are not as familiar with the tool.
cons: Pricing can get expensive depending on how you use the tool. Also, although queries can be shared, the original author is the only one who can edit them. It would be nice if it was made more collaborative in that regard.

review_title: Excellent logging integration with Sumo Logic
description: We are handling logs of our several applications at the same time and making a map for common occurrences. This is good for analyzing where we need to improve. It has helped in monitoring of our servers and finding the faults fast.
author: karan V.
pros: It is very navigable and offers perfect ui which is very intuitive. You can write any type of query , sumo logic will have answer to that type. We can easily search and export. You can configure it the way you want it to behave and give you the readings in the real time. You can know the properties of a running job from all the jobs on the dashboard which is a great plus from the similar softwares.
cons: Sometimes it is very hard to reach customer support , you may have to wait till someone can come to your rescue on an issue.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Continuous analytics Software does the log reporting better.
description: It was a great product to do continuous analytics with the large data ingested.
author: ArunSanthoshKumar A.
pros: data insights and the reporting of the application.
cons: documentation on API has to be simple and more example-oriented to get started.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Sumo Logic Review
description: An ideal solution for scaling up things when it comes to cloud operations and analytics.
author: Joel N.
pros: Surest mean to effectively run diagnostics on your servers to root out any faults that may be causing unexpected hitches. With so much flexibility, you can get just anything. The search feature works pretty fast giving you reports whenever you need info. It has a rather simplified interface that makes you just think of a mobile app. You can use the dashboard to manage logs of various applications. This lets you see areas where you need to make adjustments for improvement. In addition, you can analyze every log and mine all useful data. It integrates seamlessly with cloud providers and you get the most done with AWS right by your side. Also, if you're stuck at any point, you can reach out to customer care and have your issue addressed in good time.
cons: The live-mode feature should be made such that when you start the tool, you are automatically switched on because it's easy to forget to switch it on every time you're starting it. It would be such a good thing.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Very Clear Dashboard
description: We use Sumo Logic to monitor our web-based application. This comprises of a monitoring and alerting tool for engineers and visualising usage spikes for internal display to stakeholders.
author: Satbyul K.
pros: The Sumo Logic dashboard is very clear for engineers, and also has a presentation mode that is ideal for display on a large wall monitor for other stakeholders. API integration for simple counts, creating alerts, and setting thresholds is simple enough and easily achievable by following the online documentation and examples.
cons: The API integration can be difficult to leverage the more advanced features, such as log monitoring. Drilling down to raw numbers for a given time range is not as easy as I would like.

review_title: we are able to look at our ELB logs and make decisions
author: Doug S.
pros: low price, ease of use. The service does the work for you. Always good to have AWS do the work for you.
cons: Almost feel this should be free but maybe I need to look at it differently. It could be cheaper than it is.

review_title: A great tracker for internal logs
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I am able to track using our current date api events that a user did. We were really able to make this our own.
cons: I wish there was a hot list of calls to run or a simple format to search
author_profession: Team Lead and L1 Technical Support Engineer at Instructure

review_title: null
author: Sean F.

review_title: SumoLogic is very help to analyse the log as a centralized place
author: ramesh K.
pros: 1. The recent changes for custom time option made easy to change the time 2. The Library and manage section is useful to search the recent queries and collectors.
cons: 1. Not able to query with single and double quote and it needs lots of time to parse the message to get the expected output.
